---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change to the public surface, the protocol coverage, or the adapter set
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Goal

What does this feature let a user accomplish that they cannot
accomplish today?

## Motivation

Why is this change worth the cost of additional API surface or
additional code? Concrete user stories help.

## Proposed approach

Sketch the change. Public-facing changes should include the new or
modified function signatures and a short justification of why the
shape is the right one.

## Alternatives considered

What other shapes did you consider, and why did you reject them?

## Roadmap context

How does this proposal fit into [`ROADMAP.md`]? If it is currently
listed as out of scope, what changed?

## Additional notes

Anything else relevant — links to RFCs, server-side behavior notes,
prior art in other crates.

[`ROADMAP.md`]: ../../ROADMAP.md
